name: reporting_agent
description: Analyzes optimized inventory recommendations, calculates operational and financial supply chain KPIs, and generates business-oriented executive reports with risk and alert summaries.

capabilities.name: generate_report
capabilities.description: Process the inventory optimization agent outputs and produce a structured, high-level business report detailing KPIs, cost savings, capacity resolution, and inventory risks.

data_path.description: Path to the optimized inventory recommendations CSV file (e.g. data/processed/optimized_inventory.csv)

output_path.description: Path to save the generated markdown report (e.g. data/processed/inventory_business_report.md)

report_summary.description: Summary metrics including total items, unique warehouses/products, financial stock values, and total savings.

output_path.description: Path where the inventory business report is saved
